params.operator: The AI's signing key (may only call `requestSpend`).
params.paymentToken: The ERC-20 used for settlement (e.g. USDC).
params.vendorAddTimelock: Delay before a queued vendor can be added.

createVault(address,address,address,uint.notice: Create and index a new PolicyVault. Caller becomes the owner.

getVaultCount(address).notice: Number of vaults an owner has created.

getVaultOwner(address).notice: The owner of a vault (address(0) if not from this factory).

isVault(address).notice: Whether `addr` is a vault deployed by this factory.
